compressed_prompt: Draft 4-section resume for clown Phil Larkin, label each section X.
response:
# Resume: Phil Larkin, Professional Clown

---

## X.1 — PERSONAL PROFILE

Energetic and versatile professional clown with over 15 years of experience entertaining audiences of all ages. Known for signature slapstick routines, balloon artistry, and an infectious comedic presence. Committed to delivering safe, inclusive, and memorable performances at every engagement.

---

## X.2 — SKILLS & SPECIALIZATIONS

- Balloon twisting and sculpting (animals, hats, swords)
- Juggling (balls, clubs, and rings — up to 7 objects)
- Physical comedy and pratfall choreography
- Face painting and theatrical makeup application
- Unicycle riding and stilt walking
- Crowd engagement and audience improvisation

---

## X.3 — PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

**Lead Performer — Giggle Factory Entertainment** *(2015–Present)*
Headlined over 500 birthday parties, corporate events, and school festivals annually across the tri-state area.

**Resident Clown — Sunshine Circus Troupe** *(2010–2015)*
Performed in live touring productions before audiences of up to 2,000 guests per show.

---

## X.4 — EDUCATION & CERTIFICATIONS

- **Diploma in Performing Arts** — Ringling College, 2009
- **Child Safety & First Aid Certified** — Red Cross, renewed 2023
- **Advanced Clown Training** — Clown Camp USA, Wisconsin, 2010

---

*References and performance reel available upon request.*
